Birthday Email Promotion #1				                Copyright Free Template



Subject:  On your birthday, the sky’s the limit



Dear (insert name), 



Happy Birthday!  



We were thinking about how today is truly 

special.  After it’s not every day you get to celebrate

a friend. 



So here’s our birthday gift for you: 



[insert deal]



So take action right now.  We are definitely happy 

for your big day!



Sincerely, 



[insert name]



P.S.   Take action quick, because once your birthday

passes, you’ll miss out on this deal. So take action 

right now and [insert call to action…call, email, etc.]
